_publications._publicationTitle: Nf1 mutation expands an EGFR-dependent peripheral nerve progenitor that confers neurofibroma tumorigenic potential.

_contextSnippet: Nf1−/− DRG cell preparations gave rise to spheres in the presence of EGF and bFGF at a rate of about 1:700 by 14 days, significantly higher than wild type and Nf1+/− DRG cell suspensions (approximately 1:3000; p < 0.05
details: Nf1+/− DRG cell preparations gave rise to spheres at approximately 1:3000 rate, significantly lower than Nf1−/− (p < 0.05)
